=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/simplePipe.ts(8,3): suggestion TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
/.src/simplePipe.ts(14,3): suggestion TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)


==== /.src/simplePipe.ts (2 errors) ====
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    import { pipe } from "effect/Function"
    
    // Simple pipe call with multiple arguments
    export const result1 = pipe(
      Effect.succeed(1),
      Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
      Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
    )
    
    // Simple pipeable style
    export const result2 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
      Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
      Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
    )
